query: SELECT gc.id, gc.name, COUNT(gi.id) as image_count FROM gallery_categories gc LEFT JOIN gallery_images gi ON gc.id = gi.category_id GROUP BY gc.id, gc.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user reQhEQm8VKDhmxs.root --database TPXNrRKBQNE8qaxNyKenmM --execute SELECT gc.id, gc.name, COUNT(gi.id) as image_count FROM gallery_categories gc LEFT JOIN gallery_images gi ON gc.id = gi.category_id GROUP BY gc.id, gc.name;
